# FPI Aviation

> GCAA Part-145 approved aircraft maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) and storage provider based at Kotoka International Airport (ACC / DGAA), Accra, Ghana. FPI Aviation serves ATR 72, Embraer E-Jet, Boeing 737 and Airbus A320-family fleets across West Africa.

FPI Aviation delivers line maintenance, base maintenance (C/D checks), component MRO and avionics, aircraft storage and preservation, and 24/7 AOG (Aircraft-on-Ground) support, backed by a documented quality and safety management system aligned with international airworthiness standards.

## Services
- [Line Maintenance & AOG Support](https://fpiaviation.com/services/line-maintenance.html): Ramp and transit checks, defect rectification and 24/7 aircraft-on-ground response.
- [Base Maintenance & Heavy Checks](https://fpiaviation.com/services/base-maintenance.html): Scheduled C/D checks, structural repairs and modifications.
- [Component MRO & Avionics](https://fpiaviation.com/services/component-mro.html): Repair and overhaul of rotables, avionics and aircraft systems.
- [Aircraft Storage & Preservation](https://fpiaviation.com/services/hangar-storage.html): Short- and long-term parking, preservation and return-to-service.

## Key pages
- [Capability & Turnaround Check](https://fpiaviation.com/capability-check.html): Instantly check GCAA Part-145 coverage for an aircraft type and requirement.
- [24/7 AOG Support](https://fpiaviation.com/aog.html): Emergency aircraft-on-ground contact and dispatch.
- [Network & Coverage](https://fpiaviation.com/network.html): West-African regional coverage from the Accra hub.
- [Careers](https://fpiaviation.com/careers.html): Licensed engineer, NDT, planning and quality roles.
- [Sustainability](https://fpiaviation.com/sustainability.html): Responsible MRO operations.

## Facts
- Approval: GCAA Part-145 (aircraft maintenance organisation)
- Location: Kotoka International Airport (ACC / DGAA), Accra, Greater Accra, Ghana
- Fleets served: ATR 72, Embraer E-Jets (E170/175/190/195), Boeing 737 (NG / MAX), Airbus A320 family (A319/A320/A321, ceo & neo)
- Contact: sales@fpiaviation.com · +233 55 435 2912 · 24/7 AOG desk
